message:
Polish UX: title heading, Escape-to-close modal, helpful empty states

- Card editor heading shows title with id as subtitle (was showing id only)
- New Run modal closes on Escape key
- Empty states guide users toward next action instead of bare text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
